options.name: --version
options.help: Print version

subcommands.name: server
subcommands.about: Run or verify the Obelisk server

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.about: Start the Obelisk server

options.name: --clean-sqlite-directory
options.help: Delete the sqlite database directory before starting. Destroys all execution history

options.name: --clean-cache
options.help: Delete both the codegen cache and the OCI image cache before starting

options.name: --clean-codegen-cache
options.help: Delete only the codegen cache before starting; OCI image cache is kept

options.name: --server-config
options.help: Path to the server configuration file (server.toml). If omitted, built-in defaults are used

options.name: --deployment
options.help: Path to the deployment TOML file. If provided, the deployment is inserted and activated on startup, overriding any existing Enqueued or Active deployment in the database

options.name: --empty
options.help: Start with an empty deployment, ignoring any Enqueued or Active deployment in the database. Useful for recovering from a faulty deployment: start empty, then push a new deployment or switch to existing via gRPC

options.name: --description
options.help: Optional human-readable description for the deployment created by --deployment or --empty

options.name: --suppress-type-checking-errors
options.help: Do not fail startup when a component's imports/exports fail type checking against the current deployment

subcommands.name: verify
subcommands.about: Read the configuration, compile the components, verify their imports and exit without starting the server

options.name: --clean-cache
options.help: Delete both the codegen cache and the OCI image cache before verifying

options.name: --clean-codegen-cache
options.help: Delete only the codegen cache before verifying; OCI image cache is kept

options.name: --server-config
options.help: Path to the server configuration file (server.toml). If omitted, built-in defaults are used

options.name: --deployment
options.help: Path to the deployment TOML file. If omitted, the database's Enqueued deployment is used, falling back to the Active deployment. Errors if neither is found

options.name: --allow-unavailable-runtime-config
options.help: Tolerate runtime requirements unavailable on this server while verifying

options.name: --suppress-type-checking-errors
options.help: Do not fail when a component's imports/exports fail type checking against the deployment

options.name: --skip-db
options.help: Skip opening the sqlite database and validating its schema

subcommands.name: execution
subcommands.about: Submit, inspect, stub, cancel, pause, unpause, replay, or upgrade executions against a running server

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.about: List recent executions

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

options.name: --ffqn
options.help: Filter by function FFQN prefix. Accepts any prefix of a fully-qualified function name, e.g.: `namespace:`. Short `.../ifc.fn` form is not supported

options.name: --execution-id
options.help: Filter by execution id prefix. Useful to find all child executions if --show-derived flag is enabled

options.name: --show-derived
options.help: Include child (derived) executions spawned by workflows. By default only top-level executions are shown

options.name: --hide-finished
options.help: Hide finished executions

options.name: --limit
options.help: Number of executions to return

options.name: --json
options.help: Output as JSON instead of human-readable text

subcommands.name: logs
subcommands.about: Fetch structured logs for an execution

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

options.name: --show-derived
options.help: Include logs from child (derived) executions

options.name: --level
options.help: Minimum log level: trace, debug, info, warn, error, off. `off` disables structured log output entirely

options.name: --stream-type
options.help: Select which stream output to show: stdout, stderr, none. If not specified, both stdout and stderr are shown. Use `none` to hide all stream output

options.name: --show-run-id
options.help: Show the run ID in each log line

options.name: --after
options.help: Only show entries created after this timestamp (RFC3339, e.g. 2026-04-14T10:00:00Z)

options.name: --follow
options.help: Poll for new log entries until the execution finishes

options.name: --limit
options.help: Number of log entries to return per request (default: 20, max: 200)

options.name: --json
options.help: Output as JSON instead of human-readable text

positionals.name: execution_id
positionals.help: Execution ID to fetch logs for

subcommands.name: events
subcommands.about: Show the execution event log (history)

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

options.name: --from
options.help: Start from this event version (inclusive)

options.name: --limit
options.help: Number of events to return

options.name: --json
options.help: Output as JSON instead of human-readable text

positionals.name: execution_id
positionals.help: Execution ID

subcommands.name: responses
subcommands.about: Show join-set responses for an execution (child results, delay completions)

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

options.name: --from
options.help: Start from this response cursor (inclusive)

options.name: --limit
options.help: Number of responses to return

options.name: --json
options.help: Output as JSON instead of human-readable text

positionals.name: execution_id
positionals.help: Execution ID

subcommands.name: submit
subcommands.about: Submit a new execution and optionally follow its status stream until it finishes

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

options.name: --execution-id
options.help: Use this explicit execution ID instead of having the server assign one. Useful for idempotency. See `obelisk generate execution-id`

options.name: --follow
options.help: Follow the stream of events until the execution finishes

options.name: --no-reconnect
options.help: Do not attempt to reconnect on connection error while following the status stream

options.name: --paused
options.help: Create the execution in paused state so it won't run until explicitly unpaused or advanced

options.name: --json
options.help: Output events as JSON in Web API format instead of human-readable text

positionals.name: ffqn
positionals.help: Function to invoke, either as a fully qualified name (`ns:pkg/ifc.fn`) or shortened to `.../ifc.fn` when the interface name is unambiguous

positionals.name: parameters
positionals.help: Accepted Parameter Formats:

subcommands.name: stub
subcommands.about: Write a return value or an execution error to an already created stubbed execution, unblocking any parent workflow that is awaiting it

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

positionals.name: execution_id
positionals.help: Execution ID of the stub execution waiting for its return value

positionals.name: return_value
positionals.help: Stub a return value encoded as JSON

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.about: Get the current state of an execution, optionally following status changes

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

options.name: --follow
options.help: Follow the status stream until the execution finishes

options.name: --no-reconnect
options.help: Do not attempt to reconnect on connection error while following the status stream

options.name: --json
options.help: Output as JSON instead of human-readable text

positionals.name: execution_id
positionals.help: Execution ID to look up

subcommands.name: result
subcommands.about: Get the final result of an execution

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

options.name: --follow
options.help: Follow until the execution finishes and the final result is available

options.name: --no-reconnect
options.help: Do not attempt to reconnect on connection error while following the execution

options.name: --json
options.help: Output as JSON instead of human-readable text

positionals.name: execution_id
positionals.help: Execution ID to look up

subcommands.name: cancel
subcommands.about: Request cancellation of a running activity or pending delay

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

positionals.name: id
positionals.help: Execution id of an activity (E_01...) or a delay request (Delay_01...)

subcommands.name: pause
subcommands.about: Pause a workflow execution or a pending delay

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

positionals.name: id
positionals.help: Execution ID (`E_01`...) or delay ID (`Delay_01`...) to pause

subcommands.name: unpause
subcommands.about: Resume a previously paused workflow execution or delay

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

positionals.name: id
positionals.help: Execution ID (`E_01`...) or delay ID (`Delay_01`...) to unpause

subcommands.name: replay
subcommands.about: Replay a workflow execution from its execution log, checking for non-determinism

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

options.name: --json
options.help: Output as JSON instead of human-readable text

positionals.name: execution_id
positionals.help: Execution ID to replay

subcommands.name: advance
subcommands.about: Advance a paused workflow execution by replaying it and applying the next captured writes

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

options.name: --json
options.help: Output as JSON instead of human-readable text

options.name: --trim
options.help: Send only the first N captured writes from replay to advance

options.name: --pause-all
options.help: Pause both replayed child executions and delay requests when applying the advance

options.name: --pause-submitted-executions
options.help: Rewrite replayed submitted executions so they are created paused when advance is applied

options.name: --pause-delays
options.help: Rewrite replayed delay requests so they are created paused when advance is applied

options.name: --force
options.help: Advance even if replay finishes with an execution failure, persisting it

positionals.name: execution_id
positionals.help: Execution ID to advance

subcommands.name: upgrade
subcommands.about: Upgrade a workflow execution to the current component version in the active deployment

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

options.name: --skip-determinism-check
options.help: Skip the determinism check during upgrade

positionals.name: execution_id
positionals.help: Execution ID to upgrade

subcommands.name: component
subcommands.about: Inspect components or add/push them to an OCI registry

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.about: List components

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

options.name: --imports
options.help: Show component imports

options.name: --extensions
options.help: Show auto-generated export extensions

subcommands.name: push
subcommands.about: Push a WASM component to an OCI registry with deployment metadata

options.name: --deployment
options.help: Path to the input deployment TOML file

positionals.name: component_name
positionals.help: Component name in the input deployment TOML

positionals.name: location
positionals.help: OCI reference with `oci://` prefix. Example: `oci://docker.io/repo/image:tag`

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.about: Add a component to the deployment TOML configuration file from an OCI reference

options.name: --deployment
options.help: Path to the target deployment TOML file

options.name: --locked
options.help: Pin the location with the manifest digest (e.g. `image:tag@sha256:...`)

positionals.name: location
positionals.help: OCI reference with `oci://` prefix. Example: `oci://docker.io/repo/image:tag`

positionals.name: component_name
positionals.help: Component name in the target deployment TOML

subcommands.name: deployment
subcommands.about: Manage deployments

subcommands.name: submit
subcommands.about: Upload a deployment TOML as a new deployment; print the new deployment ID

options.name: --empty
options.help: Submit an empty deployment with no components

options.name: --allow-unavailable-runtime-config
options.help: Tolerate runtime requirements unavailable on this server while verifying the deployment before persisting it

options.name: --description
options.help: Optional human-readable description

options.name: --deployment-id
options.help: Optional client-supplied deployment ID for idempotent submission

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

positionals.name: file
positionals.help: Path to the deployment TOML file

subcommands.name: enqueue
subcommands.about: Submit (if a file is given) and enqueue for next server restart

options.name: --empty
options.help: Enqueue an empty deployment with no components

options.name: --allow-unavailable-runtime-config
options.help: Tolerate runtime requirements unavailable on this server while verifying the deployment before enqueuing it

options.name: --description
options.help: Optional human-readable description for a newly submitted deployment

options.name: --deployment-id
options.help: Optional client-supplied deployment ID for idempotent submission

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

positionals.name: source
positionals.help: Path to a deployment TOML file, or an existing deployment ID

subcommands.name: apply
subcommands.about: Submit (if a file is given) and hot-redeploy immediately. Fails if not possible

options.name: --empty
options.help: Apply an empty deployment with no components

options.name: --description
options.help: Optional human-readable description for a newly submitted deployment

options.name: --deployment-id
options.help: Optional client-supplied deployment ID for idempotent submission

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

positionals.name: source
positionals.help: Path to a deployment TOML file, or an existing deployment ID

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.about: List recent deployments

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

subcommands.name: gc
subcommands.about: Delete content-addressed file blobs not referenced by any stored deployment

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

subcommands.name: active
subcommands.about: Print the ID of the currently active deployment

options.name: --json
options.help: Output as JSON instead of plain text

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.about: Show a deployment

options.name: --json
options.help: Print the stored TOML manifest as JSON instead of TOML

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

positionals.name: id
positionals.help: Deployment ID

positionals.name: file
positionals.help: Print the content of a single source file, identified by its deployment-relative path as shown in the TOML (e.g. `scripts/run.sh`)

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.about: Retrieve a deployment to disk as a re-submittable `deployment.toml` plus its source files

options.name: --output
options.help: Directory to write `deployment.toml` and source files into. Defaults to the current directory

options.name: --force
options.help: Overwrite existing files in the output directory

options.name: --api-url
options.help: Address of the obelisk server

positionals.name: id
positionals.help: Deployment ID

subcommands.name: generate
subcommands.about: Generate configuration files and WIT artifacts

positionals.name: output
positionals.help: Filename to write the schema to, defaults to <stdout>

subcommands.name: deployment-schema

positionals.name: output
positionals.help: Filename to write the schema to, defaults to <stdout>

subcommands.name: deployment-canonical-schema

positionals.name: output
positionals.help: Filename to write the schema to, defaults to <stdout>

subcommands.name: db-schema

positionals.name: output

subcommands.name: open-api-schema

positionals.name: output
positionals.help: Filename to write the schema to, defaults to <stdout>

subcommands.name: cli-schema
subcommands.about: Generate the CLI shape in JSON format

subcommands.name: component-metadata-annotation-schema

positionals.name: output

subcommands.name: wit-extensions
subcommands.about: Generate extension WIT files that are automatically implemented by Obelisk based on the exported interfaces of the component (e.g. `-schedule`, `-await-next` variants)

options.name: --json
options.help: Output as JSON instead of human-readable text

options.name: --force
options.help: Overwrite existing files in the output directory

positionals.name: component_type
positionals.help: Component type this WIT is for. One of `workflow`, `activity`, `activity_stub`, `webhook_endpoint`

positionals.name: input_wit_directory
positionals.help: Path to the `wit` folder containing the target world and, if present, a `deps` subfolder

positionals.name: output_directory
positionals.help: Directory where folders and WIT files will be written to

options.name: --json

positionals.name: component_type
positionals.help: Component type whose host interfaces to emit. One of `workflow`, `activity`, `activity_stub`, `webhook_endpoint`

positionals.name: output_directory
positionals.help: Directory where folders and WIT files will be written to

options.help: Skip local-path components
